nodes.label: G8 — gallery demo + release-readiness pass (goals.md §G8)
nodes.justify: grouping — the milestone root; its five DoD threads are the child groups

nodes.label: gallery surface — the kernel-dogfooding <component-gallery> on the docs site
nodes.justify: grouping — DoD thread 1 (gallery renders every control, one theme provider, forced-colors)

nodes.label: <component-gallery> + <theme-provider> elements + gallery page + nav link (site/lib/component-gallery.{ts,css} · site/lib/theme-provider.ts · site/pages/gallery.ts · site/gallery.html · _page.ts NAV ungrouped link) — theming per Kim's reframe: scheme/scale/density live, `theme` a reserved wired seam (one `default` package; swapping = next-tier, F2b)
nodes.accept: `npm run check` exit 0 (incl. check:site) AND `npm run build` exit 0; site/lib/component-gallery.ts imports ONLY the public `@agent-ui/components` barrel + site/lib modules (grep: no packages/**/src deep import); gallery.html renders <component-gallery> composing ONE <theme-provider scheme scale density theme>; _page.ts NAV carries the Gallery link UNGROUPED (site-toc gate stays green)

nodes.label: gallery gates — jsdom derived-list/filter/provider probes + cross-engine browser smoke (whole-shape · scheme/scale/density axes + theme seam · forced-colors)
nodes.accept: `npm test` exit 0 incl. site/gallery.test.ts (derived member list ≡ the ALL_DESCRIPTORS ui-* tag set, with a biting negative control; filter subsequence semantics; node-identity across filter toggle) AND `npm run test:browser` exit 0 incl. gallery.browser.test.ts (every non-overlay specimen bounding box > 0; overlay-class specimens open via their descriptor `open` knob then paint; the ONE <theme-provider>'s scale/density change computed px and scheme flips used colors; the `theme` select shows exactly one option (default) and the attribute lands on the provider subtree; Chromium forced-colors leg green)

nodes.label: independent component-reviewer pass on the gallery (pre-commit NO-GO gate)
nodes.accept: component-reviewer verdict recorded GO (zero blockers, both applicable axes ≥ 4) BEFORE the gallery commit; any NO-GO finding closed and re-checked

nodes.label: packaging + size — per-control exports and the marginal gate (ADR-0049 Am1 booking)
per-control `exports` map + drift gate (components package.json `./controls/{name}` entries · barrels.test.ts extension)
nodes.accept: package.json exports carries exactly one `./controls/{name}` entry per shipped control module (incl. radio-group); `npm run check && npm test` exit 0; the drift test FAILS when an entry/folder is added or removed unpaired (negative control committed and proven to bite)

nodes.label: marginal size gate — measure-size.mjs leave-one-out per-control marginal + pinned budget table + public-entry solo report
nodes.accept: `npm run size` exit 0 reporting, for EVERY `./controls/{name}` entry: (i) leave-one-out marginal gz vs the pinned per-control budget (default 2048 B; overrides only with a cited reason), exit 1 on breach (negative control: a planted budget=1 proves the gate bites); (ii) informational solo absolute (foundation-inclusive); existing foundation + family legs unchanged; gate stays MANUAL per ADR-0040 §3

nodes.label: coherence audit — no API/token/lifecycle drift across the ui-* family
family-coherence standing gate (controls/family-coherence.test.ts — mechanized cross-family invariants)
nodes.accept: `npm test` exit 0 incl. family-coherence.test.ts asserting per ADR-0081: descriptor event names ⊆ {change,input,select,open,close,toggle}; every `size` attr enum ≡ [sm,md,lg]; each {name}.css :where(ui-{name}) block declares only --ui-{name}-* custom props and consumes only own + allowlisted shared tokens; descriptor file per control folder with tag↔class↔folder naming; descriptor `extends` ∈ sanctioned bases; every control registered in controls/index.ts + component-styles.css — EACH invariant with a synthetic-violation negative control proven to bite

nodes.label: judged read-only cross-family audit (component-reviewer): keyboard/ARIA/two-way-open/error-leg symmetry + budgets/tree-shake evidence
nodes.accept: component-reviewer read-only audit report delivered citing file:line evidence; ZERO MAJOR findings open (each finding filed with a routed owner); `npm run size` and tree-shake.test.ts runs cited as evidence that budgets held and importing one control drags only it + real deps

nodes.label: decision ledger — plan.md §12 + the G8 ADRs
plan.md §12 dispositions applied (each of the 6 items resolved or deferred-with-reason; goals.md G8 boxes synced in the same change)
nodes.accept: plan.md §12 shows every enumerated item marked RESOLVED (with evidence ref) or DEFERRED (with a written reason + revisit trigger); no item left silently open; goals.md §G8 checkboxes flipped in the same commit; `npm run check` exit 0

nodes.label: ADR ratification — ADR-0079 (gallery architecture) · ADR-0080 (per-control exports + marginal gate) · ADR-0081 (family coherence gate) proposed → Kim ratifies; the ADR-0077 `Extended by ADR-0079` backlink lands in the same change (the two-way link discipline)
nodes.accept: each of ADR-0079/0080/0081 passes `adr_check.py` exit 0, carries Status: accepted set by Kim (never self-flipped), and its Repairs-named docs are repaired in the same change — including ADR-0077's `Supersedes / Superseded by` row gaining `Extended by ADR-0079`; README index rows present

nodes.label: CHANGELOG/status note — the foundation milestone recorded; NEXT-tier scope dial flagged to Kim (not decided)
nodes.accept: CHANGELOG.md exists at the repo root with the foundation-milestone entry (G0–G9 + Control Suite + G8, gate figures cited); the NEXT-tier fork (layout/display primitives vs agent-app surfaces) is FLAGGED as Kim's scope-dial decision with no scope chosen; `npm run check` exit 0

actions.label: render every shipped ui-* control from its {name}.md descriptor (derive the member list, never hand-author it)
filter the gallery grid through a kernel `signal` (the dogfood filter)
reconcile the grid with the `repeat` directive (keyed enter/exit, stable order)
read out live gallery state through `watch` holes (shown-count readout)
theme every specimen through ONE <theme-provider> subtree (scheme · scale · density + the reserved `theme` package seam)
survive forced-colors: active (gallery chrome + specimens)
prove every specimen renders a visible box (the whole-shape lesson; overlays proven open)
keep the site TOC/nav/coverage gates green with the new page (ungrouped link)
expose a public per-control entry for every control (the ADR-0049 Am1 gap)
gate the per-control marginal ≤ ~2 KB gz (the eventual DISTRIBUTED footprint)
prove tree-shake through the PUBLIC entries (importing one control drags only it + real deps)
mechanize the cross-family API/token/lifecycle invariants as a standing gate
judge the non-mechanizable family symmetry read-only (keyboard/ARIA/two-way-open/error legs)
evidence that budgets held (size + marginal runs cited, not asserted)
disposition every plan.md §12 open decision (resolve, or defer with a written reason)
ratify the proposed ADRs via a separate seat (generator ≠ ratifier; Kim)
record the foundation milestone in a CHANGELOG/status note
flag the NEXT-tier scope dial to Kim without deciding it
independent review of the gallery before its commit (generator ≠ critic)
prove each NEW gate bites with a negative control

edges.why: the gallery gates exercise the built element/page — the smoke needs a rendered gallery to assert whole-shape/theming/forced-colors on
the reviewer grades gated, built work (the load-bearing pre-commit discipline); a review of an ungated build re-runs anyway

the marginal gate measures THROUGH the public `./controls/{name}` entries n2a creates — measuring src paths would not prove the public surface delivers the 5–14 KB subsets (the exact ADR-0049 Am1 finding)
the judged audit's 'budgets held' leg cites the measured per-control marginals n2b produces
the judged audit starts from the mechanized gate's green baseline so judgment spends only on the non-mechanizable remainder (no double-checking what the gate already proves)
plan.md §12 edits record RATIFIED decisions — the exports-structure resolution cites accepted ADR-0080, and the two Kim-call deferrals need Kim's answer before the ledger can state them
the status note records a shipped gallery — it cites the reviewer GO + gate figures, which must exist first
the status note cites the measured per-control marginal figures
the status note cites the coherence-audit clean verdict
the status note states '§12 all resolved/deferred' — the ledger must be settled before the note can claim it
